nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker build based on python:3.11-slim that installs system and Python dependencies, copies the entire backend application, provisions a local bucket directory structure for patient/provider/upload files, and launches the FastAPI server via uvicorn on port 8000.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a slim base image and cleans apt caches in the same RUN layer to keep the image lean. A comment in the Dockerfile notes that the local bucket structure can be replaced with S3/boto3 for cloud storage.
